skills.name: session-wrap:wrap
skills.description: Session wrap-up — analyze, suggest docs, automation, follow-ups
skills.description_long: Analyzes the current session to suggest documentation updates, automation opportunities, and follow-up tasks. The primary session-end workflow.

skills.name: meeting
skills.description: Tiro meeting notes from Notion to Obsidian
skills.description_long: Reads Tiro-transcribed meeting notes from Notion, corrects STT errors using glossary, structures the content, collects related note context, and saves to Obsidian.

skills.name: context
skills.description: Load full project context from all knowledge sources
skills.description_long: Searches Obsidian vault, Notion workspaces, project memory, and session history to assemble comprehensive context before starting work. Essential for complex tasks requiring cross-source understanding.

skills.name: memo
skills.description: Quick memo capture to Obsidian Knowledge Vault
skills.description_long: Captures quick memos to Obsidian daily notes or inbox. Handles wikilinks, tags, and automatic daily note creation. The most frequently used knowledge capture tool.

skills.name: notion-reader
skills.description: Read public Notion pages as markdown
skills.description_long: Extracts content from public Notion pages using the unofficial API with cursor-based pagination. Converts blocks to clean markdown. Useful for consuming shared documentation and resources.

skills.name: superpowers:brainstorming
skills.description: Explore intent, requirements and design before implementation
skills.description_long: Must-use skill before any creative work. Explores user intent, gathers requirements, and designs the approach before touching code. Prevents premature implementation.

skills.name: video-dl
skills.description: Download videos from Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, X and more
skills.description_long: Downloads videos and images from nearly any platform using yt-dlp with browser cookie authentication. Supports audio-only extraction and custom output paths.

skills.name: audio-transcribe
skills.description: Local audio transcription with mlx_whisper + glossary correction
skills.description_long: Transcribes m4a/mp3/wav/mp4 audio files locally using mlx_whisper. Automatically applies glossary-based correction and removes Whisper hallucinations.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:cancel
skills.description: Cancel any active OMC execution mode
skills.description_long: Cancels autopilot, ralph, ultrawork, ultraqa, swarm, ultrapilot, pipeline, or team modes. Use --force to clear all state.

skills.name: update-config
skills.description: Configure Claude Code settings.json
skills.description_long: Modifies Claude Code harness settings. Handles hooks, automated behaviors, and configuration changes via settings.json.

skills.name: buddy
skills.description: Skill: buddy
skills.description_long: Discovered skill: buddy (not in registry)

skills.name: defuddle
skills.description: Extract clean readable content from web pages
skills.description_long: Strips clutter from web pages and extracts the main readable content as clean markdown. Useful for articles, blog posts, and documentation.

skills.name: kakaotalk
skills.description: KakaoTalk messaging (shorthand)
skills.description_long: Shorthand alias for kakaotalk:kakaotalk.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:omc-teams
skills.description: CLI-team runtime for claude/codex/gemini workers in tmux
skills.description_long: Spawns CLI workers (Claude, Codex, or Gemini) in tmux panes for process-based parallel execution.

skills.name: superpowers:subagent-driven-development
skills.description: Execute plans with independent parallel sub-agents
skills.description_long: Dispatches independent implementation tasks to parallel sub-agents within the current session. Maximizes throughput for non-dependent work.

skills.name: superpowers:systematic-debugging
skills.description: Root-cause analysis before proposing fixes
skills.description_long: Systematic debugging approach: reproduce, isolate, hypothesize, verify. Prevents shotgun debugging by requiring evidence-based diagnosis.

skills.name: superpowers:writing-plans
skills.description: Create implementation plans before touching code
skills.description_long: Structures multi-step tasks into detailed implementation plans with clear phases, dependencies, and checkpoints.

skills.name: autopilot
skills.description: Alias for oh-my-claudecode:autopilot
skills.description_long: Shorthand alias for oh-my-claudecode:autopilot.

skills.name: coach-changjun
skills.description: 1:1 coaching agent based on Kim Chang-jun methodology
skills.description_long: Provides 1:1 coaching using Kim Chang-jun's methodology. Helps think through personal and professional dilemmas with structured questioning.

skills.name: frontend-design
skills.description: Production-grade frontend interfaces (shorthand)
skills.description_long: Shorthand alias for frontend-design:frontend-design.

skills.name: google-calendar:google-calendar
skills.description: Google Calendar events CRUD
skills.description_long: Create, read, update, and delete Google Calendar events. Supports the personal account with Asia/Seoul timezone.

skills.name: keybindings-help
skills.description: Customize keyboard shortcuts and keybindings
skills.description_long: Helps customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:omc-help
skills.description: Show OMC help and available commands
skills.description_long: Displays available OMC commands, agents, tools, and skills with usage examples.

skills.name: passes
skills.description: Skill: passes
skills.description_long: Discovered skill: passes (not in registry)

skills.name: pptx-design-styles
skills.description: PPTX slides with 30 modern design styles
skills.description_long: Creates professional PPTX presentations using 30 modern design styles including Glassmorphism, Neo-Brutalism, Bento Grid, Dark Academia, and more.

skills.name: product-psychology-for-vibe-coding
skills.description: Product psychology for UI/UX design — 6P, BMAP, B.I.A.S, Peak-End
skills.description_long: Applies product psychology principles to UI/UX design: 6P Storyboard, BMAP behavior model, B.I.A.S framework, Peak-End journey map, and ethical design checks.

skills.name: research
skills.description: Search across all knowledge sources for context on a topic
skills.description_long: Multi-source research across Obsidian, Notion, web, and memory. Synthesizes findings into structured output with citations.

skills.name: session-wrap:history-insight
skills.description: Capture and reference session history for saving or analysis
skills.description_long: Access, capture, or reference Claude Code session history. Useful for saving important exchanges, extracting patterns, or auditing past sessions.

skills.name: session-wrap:session-wrap
skills.description: Full session wrap — document learnings, commit suggestions
skills.description_long: Comprehensive session wrap-up that documents learnings, suggests commits, and captures reusable patterns from the current coding session.

skills.name: superpowers:using-git-worktrees
skills.description: Create isolated git worktrees for feature work
skills.description_long: Creates isolated git worktrees with smart directory selection and safety verification. Ideal for starting feature work that needs isolation.

skills.name: superpowers:writing-skills
skills.description: Create or edit skills with deployment verification
skills.description_long: Guides creation and editing of Claude Code skills with proper structure, testing, and deployment verification.

skills.name: wiki-ingest
skills.description: Ingest materials into LLM Wiki
skills.description_long: Reads source material (lecture notes, articles, meeting notes, PDFs) and integrates key information into the LLM Wiki knowledge base. Updates index and log files.

skills.name: challenge
skills.description: Devil's Advocate analysis for decisions and strategies
skills.description_long: Critically analyzes strategies, plans, and decisions by identifying dangerous assumptions, failure scenarios, and overlooked perspectives.

skills.name: clarify:metamedium
skills.description: Content vs form analysis — optimize what vs change how
skills.description_long: Helps decide whether to optimize content (what) or change the form/medium (how). Useful when stuck between improving existing approach vs trying a new format.

skills.name: clarify:unknown
skills.description: Surface hidden assumptions with Known/Unknown 4-quadrant framework
skills.description_long: Applies the Known/Unknown 4-quadrant framework to surface blind spots and hidden assumptions in strategies, plans, or decisions.

skills.name: clarify:vague
skills.description: Iterative questioning to clarify ambiguous requirements
skills.description_long: When requirements are ambiguous, uses iterative questioning to make them actionable. Refines until the requirement is implementable.

skills.name: claude-api
skills.description: Build apps with Claude API or Anthropic SDK
skills.description_long: Assists in building applications using the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Agent SDK. Triggered when code imports anthropic or @anthropic-ai/sdk.

skills.name: crig-concept-learning
skills.description: Deep concept understanding via rigging and crystallization
skills.description_long: Scaffolds understanding of complex concepts by breaking them into structural components (rigging) and distilling into a seed sentence. Ideal for learning new domains.

skills.name: frontend-design:frontend-design
skills.description: Production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality
skills.description_long: Creates distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces that avoid generic AI aesthetics. Generates creative, polished code for web components, pages, and applications.

skills.name: hook-skip-pattern
skills.description: Manage session-end-log.sh SKIP_PATTERNS with JSONL testing
skills.description_long: Manages SKIP_PATTERNS in session-end-log.sh and tests them against JSONL files for immediate validation.

skills.name: interactive-review:review
skills.description: Interactive markdown review with web UI
skills.description_long: Opens a web-based review interface for markdown documents. Supports inline comments and structured feedback.

skills.name: kakaotalk:kakaotalk
skills.description: Send/read KakaoTalk messages on macOS
skills.description_long: Sends and reads KakaoTalk messages using macOS automation. Supports message composition and chat reading.

skills.name: loop
skills.description: Run a prompt or command on a recurring interval
skills.description_long: Executes a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g., every 5 minutes). Useful for polling, monitoring, or recurring tasks.

skills.name: morning-briefing
skills.description: Morning briefing from calendar, memory, and recent activity
skills.description_long: Generates a comprehensive morning briefing by pulling today's calendar events, recent memory entries, pending tasks, and session activity summary.

skills.name: my-tools
skills.description: Explain installed plugins, skills, and commands
skills.description_long: Lists and explains all installed plugins, skills, and commands with usage examples and descriptions.

skills.name: notion-extract
skills.description: Safe Notion workspace search with field extraction within context limits
skills.description_long: Searches Notion workspaces and extracts only core fields to stay within context limits. Safer than raw MCP calls for large databases.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:ai-slop-cleaner
skills.description: Clean AI-generated code slop with deletion-first workflow
skills.description_long: Cleans AI-generated code using regression-safe, deletion-first workflow. Optional reviewer-only mode.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:ask
skills.description: Process-first advisor routing for Claude, Codex, or Gemini
skills.description_long: Routes questions to Claude, Codex, or Gemini via /ask with artifact capture. No raw CLI assembly needed.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:autopilot
skills.description: Full autonomous execution from idea to working code
skills.description_long: End-to-end autonomous execution: plan, implement, test, verify. Takes an idea and delivers working code.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:ccg
skills.description: Claude-Codex-Gemini tri-model orchestration
skills.description_long: Fans out work to Codex and Gemini via /ask, then Claude synthesizes the results for tri-model consensus.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:configure-notifications
skills.description: Configure Telegram, Discord, or Slack notifications
skills.description_long: Sets up notification integrations via natural language for Telegram, Discord, or Slack.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:debug
skills.description: Diagnose OMC session or repo state
skills.description_long: Diagnoses the current OMC session or repository state using logs, traces, state inspection, and focused reproduction.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:deep-dive
skills.description: Trace + deep-interview pipeline with 3-point injection
skills.description_long: 2-stage pipeline: causal investigation (trace) followed by requirements crystallization (deep-interview) with 3-point injection.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:deep-interview
skills.description: Socratic deep interview with ambiguity gating
skills.description_long: Socratic deep interview with mathematical ambiguity gating before autonomous execution. Ensures requirements are crystal clear.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:deepinit
skills.description: Deep codebase init with hierarchical AGENTS.md
skills.description_long: Performs deep codebase initialization by generating hierarchical AGENTS.md documentation for the project.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:external-context
skills.description: Parallel document-specialist agents for web searches
skills.description_long: Invokes parallel document-specialist agents to perform external web searches and documentation lookup.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:hud
skills.description: Configure HUD display options
skills.description_long: Configures heads-up display layout, presets, and display elements for the OMC interface.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:learner
skills.description: Extract a learned skill from the current conversation
skills.description_long: Identifies a repeatable pattern in the current conversation and extracts it into a reusable skill.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:mcp-setup
skills.description: Configure popular MCP servers
skills.description_long: Sets up MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers for enhanced agent capabilities.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:omc-doctor
skills.description: Diagnose and fix oh-my-claudecode installation issues
skills.description_long: Runs diagnostic checks on the OMC installation and provides fixes for common issues.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:omc-setup
skills.description: Install or refresh oh-my-claudecode
skills.description_long: Canonical setup flow for oh-my-claudecode plugin, npm, and local-dev installations.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:plan
skills.description: Strategic planning with optional interview workflow
skills.description_long: Creates strategic execution plans with optional interview-based requirement gathering. Supports --consensus and --review modes.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:project-session-manager
skills.description: Worktree-first dev environment for issues, PRs, features
skills.description_long: Manages development environments using worktree-first approach for issues, PRs, and features with optional tmux sessions.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:ralph
skills.description: Self-referential loop until task completion with verification
skills.description_long: Keeps working in a loop until the task is fully completed and verified. Includes ultrawork for maximum parallelism.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:ralplan
skills.description: Consensus planning with Planner, Architect, Critic iteration
skills.description_long: Iterative planning with Planner, Architect, and Critic agents until consensus. Supports --deliberate for high-risk work with pre-mortem and expanded test planning.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:release
skills.description: Automated release workflow for oh-my-claudecode
skills.description_long: Handles the release process for oh-my-claudecode including versioning, changelog, and publishing.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:remember
skills.description: Review reusable knowledge and route to appropriate storage
skills.description_long: Reviews reusable project knowledge and decides whether it belongs in project memory, notepad, or durable documentation.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:sciomc
skills.description: Parallel scientist agents for comprehensive analysis
skills.description_long: Orchestrates parallel scientist agents in AUTO mode for comprehensive data and statistical analysis.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:self-improve
skills.description: Autonomous evolutionary code improvement with tournament selection
skills.description_long: Runs autonomous code improvement iterations using tournament selection to evolve better solutions.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:setup
skills.description: Install/update routing for OMC setup flows
skills.description_long: Entry point that routes setup, doctor, or MCP requests to the correct OMC setup flow.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:skill
skills.description: Manage local skills — list, add, remove, search, edit
skills.description_long: CRUD operations for local skills including listing, adding, removing, searching, and editing with a setup wizard.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:skillify
skills.description: Turn a repeatable workflow into a reusable OMC skill draft
skills.description_long: Extracts a repeatable workflow pattern from the current session and generates a reusable OMC skill draft.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:team
skills.description: N coordinated agents on shared task list
skills.description_long: Orchestrates N coordinated Claude Code agents working on a shared task list with stage-aware routing through plan, PRD, exec, verify, and fix stages.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:trace
skills.description: Evidence-driven tracing with competing hypotheses
skills.description_long: Orchestrates competing tracer hypotheses in team mode for evidence-driven investigation of complex issues.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:ultraqa
skills.description: QA cycling — test, verify, fix, repeat until goal met
skills.description_long: Iterative QA workflow that runs tests, verifies results, fixes issues, and repeats until the quality goal is met.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:ultrawork
skills.description: Maximum parallelism with parallel agent orchestration
skills.description_long: Parallel execution engine for high-throughput task completion. Dispatches work to multiple agents simultaneously.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:verify
skills.description: Verify changes really work before claiming completion
skills.description_long: Runs verification checks to confirm that changes actually work before claiming completion. Evidence-based completion gate.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:visual-verdict
skills.description: Structured visual QA for screenshot-to-reference comparisons
skills.description_long: Provides structured visual QA verdicts when comparing screenshots to reference designs.

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:wiki
skills.description: LLM Wiki — persistent markdown knowledge base
skills.description_long: Manages the LLM Wiki persistent markdown knowledge base that compounds knowledge across sessions (Karpathy model).

skills.name: oh-my-claudecode:writer-memory
skills.description: Agentic memory for writers — characters, relationships, scenes
skills.description_long: Tracks characters, relationships, scenes, and themes for creative writing projects.

skills.name: pdf-to-excel
skills.description: Extract PDF tables to styled Excel files
skills.description_long: Extracts tabular data from PDF documents and generates styled Excel files with formatting, hyperlinks, and filters using openpyxl.

skills.name: prd
skills.description: Socratic questioning-based PRD writing workflow
skills.description_long: Guides PRD creation through Socratic questioning: asks 5-7 clarifying questions with rationale, gathers answers, challenges with 2-3 follow-ups, then drafts the PRD.

skills.name: professor-research
skills.description: Research professor/researcher profiles from multiple sources
skills.description_long: Investigates professor/researcher profiles using email OSINT, academic databases (DBpia, Scholar, ResearchGate), university faculty pages, and Yes24 author pages.

skills.name: schedule
skills.description: Scheduled remote agents on cron
skills.description_long: Creates, updates, lists, or runs scheduled remote agents (triggers) that execute on a cron schedule.

skills.name: session-wrap:session-analyzer
skills.description: Analyze and verify skill execution in past sessions
skills.description_long: Evaluates skill execution correctness by analyzing session logs. Verifies that skills ran as expected and surfaces any anomalies.

skills.name: simplify
skills.description: Review changed code for quality and efficiency
skills.description_long: Reviews recently changed code for reuse opportunities, quality issues, and efficiency improvements, then fixes problems found.

skills.name: stt
skills.description: Correct and structure STT transcripts
skills.description_long: Corrects speech-to-text transcription errors using glossary-based matching and structures the output into readable format.

skills.name: superpowers:dispatching-parallel-agents
skills.description: Dispatch 2+ independent tasks to parallel agents
skills.description_long: When facing multiple independent tasks without shared state, dispatches them to parallel agents for concurrent execution.

skills.name: superpowers:executing-plans
skills.description: Execute implementation plans with review checkpoints
skills.description_long: Executes written implementation plans in a separate session with built-in review checkpoints at each phase.

skills.name: superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch
skills.description: Guide completion of development branch — merge, PR, or cleanup
skills.description_long: When implementation is complete and tests pass, presents structured options for integrating work: merge, PR creation, or cleanup.

skills.name: superpowers:receiving-code-review
skills.description: Handle code review feedback with technical rigor
skills.description_long: Processes code review feedback with verification, not blind agreement. Requires technical rigor before implementing suggestions.

skills.name: superpowers:requesting-code-review
skills.description: Request code review to verify work meets requirements
skills.description_long: Triggers code review when completing tasks or before merging. Verifies work meets stated requirements.

skills.name: superpowers:test-driven-development
skills.description: Write tests before implementation code
skills.description_long: Enforces TDD: red (write failing test) -> green (minimal implementation) -> refactor. Ensures test coverage drives development.

skills.name: superpowers:using-superpowers
skills.description: Establish how to find and use skills at conversation start
skills.description_long: Entry point skill that teaches how to discover and invoke other skills. Must be invoked before any response including clarifying questions.

skills.name: superpowers:verification-before-completion
skills.description: Verify work before claiming completion — evidence first
skills.description_long: Must run verification commands and confirm output before making any success claims. Evidence before assertions, always.

skills.name: visualize-notion
skills.description: Visual transformation of Notion pages
skills.description_long: Transforms Notion pages into visually enhanced formats with custom styling and layout.

skills.name: wiki-lint
skills.description: Audit wiki health: conflicts, stale pages, gaps
skills.description_long: Checks the LLM Wiki for contradictions, outdated information, orphan pages, missing concepts, and data gaps. Produces actionable fix suggestions.

suggested_new.name: gov-program-research
suggested_new.description: Automated government/institutional support program research and archiving
suggested_new.reason: Identified in backlog: manual research of 8+ programs took ~1 hour. Automates extraction of program name, eligibility, funding, deadlines, and application URLs into consistent schema.

suggested_new.name: notion-to-obsidian-sync
suggested_new.description: Automated Notion-to-Obsidian sync combining meeting + notion-reader patterns
suggested_new.reason: The meeting and notion-reader skills are both heavily used. A unified sync skill would automate the recurring pattern of pulling Notion content into Obsidian.

suggested_new.name: weekly-class-prep
suggested_new.description: Automated weekly class preparation document generation for K-Arts
suggested_new.reason: CLAUDE.md defines a detailed Sunday prep protocol that reads all syllabi, extracts assignments, and generates weekly prep documents. Currently manual.
